T0592.title: Verifiable Credential
T0592.definition: A tamper-evident credential whose issuer, subject, claims, and status can be cryptographically verified.
T0592.description: Verifiable Credential is used to identify related risks, abuse patterns, control requirements, and operational signals in BREAK business-security analysis.
T0592.usageExample: Assess Verifiable Credential related exposure and define the corresponding controls.
